title: From All, One
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
lore: 'Turn back,' something pleads from the dark, in a tone almost tender, almost familiar.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. forall_elim(T, P, a) then ⊢ ∀y. P(y); by all;. (2) Uses inst. exists_intro(T, P, a) then ⊢ P(a); by inst(P, all, a);. (3) Uses inst and all_to_ex. and_intro cases; by inst(P, all, a); and by all_to_ex(P, all, a);.
